changes.text: Bulk proxy assignment: assign proxies to multiple accounts at once via flexible login:proxy, login:ID or login-only input
Import dialog now allows assigning imported mafiles to a group directly; added option to skip confirmation when no conflicts are detected
Assign random free proxy to the account from context menu
Export: added ZIP archive output, export-all mode when the input field is empty, and support for login:password input format
When a session permanently expires during a user-initiated action, a login dialog is now shown instead of a generic error notification
Proxy manager: account count badges now show how many accounts are assigned to each proxy entry
Website and Documentation links are now available from the links window
Application no longer fails to start when Steam time synchronization is unavailable (network issues, firewall)
Fixed incorrect Steam Guard error message shown in the Mafile Mover dialog
